---

## Symptom

What performance issue is observed?

## Baseline

Capture current latency, throughput, wait event, plan, lag, or batch duration.

## Remediation

What change is proposed?

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Before and after metrics captured
- [ ] Regression risk documented
- [ ] Rollback plan documented
- [ ] Production monitoring defined
